collectionView.description: A record collection (lexicon type) present in the org's synced data, with a count of the distinct records in it the calling user can see.

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

recordCount.description: Number of distinct records in this collection the calling user can see, counted across all spaces they can read.

recordView.description: A record identified by its repo, collection and rkey, together with the spaces it belongs to that the calling user can read. The record body is not included; fetch it on demand from pear with one of the spaces.

uri.description: The AT URI of the record (at://repo/collection/rkey).

repo.description: DID of the repo the record lives in.

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

spaces.description: URIs of the spaces this record belongs to that the calling user can read.
